mapper.update: UPDATE dataset_image SET is_train = 0, is_validation = 0, is_test = 0 WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId}
mapper.sql: id, dataset_id, name, path, modification_count, is_train, is_validation, is_test
mapper.select: SELECT setval('dataset_image_id_seq', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(id) FROM dataset_image), 0))
